pageCaption.value: Winning a 2023 Rolex Award helps Liu Shaochuang to scale up his research by tracking and monitoring more wild camels.

WaPageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Liu Shaochuang - Episode 3

metadescription.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate Liu Shaochuang is working to scale up his model for endangered species protection using satellites. Watch the video on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate: Liu Shaochuang - Episode 3

title.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate: Liu Shaochuang - Episode 3

text.value: Winning a 2023 Rolex Award helps Liu Shaochuang to scale up his research by tracking and monitoring more wild camels. While he keeps his efforts focused on the animals, Liu is hopeful the model his team has created can be used by conservationists around the world to protect other endangered species, such as snow leopards and Siberian tigers.

pageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Liu Shaochuang - Episode 1

pageCaption.value: Liu Shaochuang, a 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate, is using a modern solution to help an ancient creature. For thousands of years, wild camels have roamed the vast plains of the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and China but they are now critically endangered.

WaPageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Liu Shaochuang - Episode 1

metadescription.value: Remote sensing specialist Liu Shaochuang is applying his expertise to the protection of endangered camels in the Gobi Desert. Watch the video on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate: Liu Shaochuang - Episode 1

pageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Liu Shaochuang - Episode 2

pageCaption.value: Through the use of tracking collars and remote sensing technology, 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate Liu Shaochuang has been monitoring the movements of wild camels across the Gobi Desert.

WaPageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Liu Shaochuang - Episode 2

metadescription.value: Using satellite data, scientist Liu Shaochuang is building a habitat suitability model for endangered camels in the Gobi Desert. Watch the video on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate: Liu Shaochuang - Episode 2

pageTitle.value: Race to rescue the Siberian tiger - Video

pageCaption.value: For the past 17 years, Sergei Bereznuk, a staunch Russian conservationist and ecologist, has been working valiantly to save the Amur tiger. Based on his experience since 1995 with a tiger anti-poaching brigade in the Russian Far East province Primorsky Krai, Bereznuk is convinced that saving the Amur tiger depends on both the efficiency of anti-poaching measures and the education of the local people.
